evidence_summary: All 3 gates pass (cabal build all exit 0, cabal test 1273 examples 0 failures, thesis-conformance-gate PASS). 6 new spec files created covering MLF.Util.UnionFind, MLF.Util.Graph, MLF.Reify.TypeOps, MLF.Reify.Named, MLF.Reify.Type, and MLF.Reify.Core with 96 new test examples. Every tested function has >= 3 meaningful examples. All 8 plan steps implemented. Test count increased from 1177 to 1273 with no regressions.
